---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section">
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">Data Visualization Portfolio</p>
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    The Plots<br><em>Thicken</em>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    Plotting everyday drama and data
  </p>
  <a href="plots/index.html" class="hero-cta">View the plots</a>
</section>

<section style="padding: 5rem 4rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
  <p class="section-label">What's here</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">The collection</h2>

  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);">

    <a href="plots/index.html" style="text-decoration:none; display:block; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; background: #0a0a0f; transition: background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='#111118'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#0a0a0f'">
      <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); margin-bottom: 0.75rem;">01</div>
      <div style="font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;">Plots</div>
      <div style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); line-height: 1.7;">All the plots — browse the full collection.</div>
    </a>

  </div>
</section>
```
